links.targetTitle: DocumentToolbar exposes className enabledControls and callback props
The DocumentToolbar className prop merges with defaults via twMerge

title: Footer Wordmark Pattern
content: The Powerhouse parent brand features a distinctive footer design pattern where a full-width SVG wordmark (powerhouse-wordmark-gradient.svg) is rendered at the bottom of the page and partially cropped using overflow: hidden on its container. The wordmark displays the word "POWERHOUSE" in a large, gradient-filled treatment that extends beyond the viewport edge, creating a subtle watermark effect. This element should be placed outside any padded container, directly at the body level, to achieve the full-width bleed. The pattern serves as a brand signature and is documented in the illustrations.html guidelines. The gradient on the wordmark uses the brand's signature cyan-to-purple gradient (#00D4FF to #7A3AFF). Reference: https://github.com/powerhouse-inc/design-systems/tree/main/powerhouse.
description: Full-width SVG wordmark (powerhouse-wordmark-gradient.svg) partially cropped at page bottom as a brand signature element.
